sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
From the segmentation data:
- Charcoal (c) at top=45, left=33 - on the right side of the divider now
- Target (Y) at top=45, left=51 - the yellow L-shape
- Avatar (B, pixels=40) at top=45, left=21 - on the left side of the divider
So charcoal is at col 33, target is at col 51. Distance is 51-33 = 18 columns. Each LEFT move pushes charcoal +3 cols. So I need 18/3 = 6 more LEFT moves to get charcoal to col 51 where the target is.
But wait - I need to be careful. The avatar is at col 21, and moving LEFT moves it -3 cols. After 6 LEFT moves, avatar would be at col 21 - 18 = 3, which is still on the board (cols start at 0). Let me try 6 LEFT moves.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Charcoal at col 33, target at col 51. Need 6 LEFT moves to push charcoal to col 51.
action(['LEFT', 'LEFT', 'LEFT', 'LEFT', 'LEFT', 'LEFT'])
</parameter>
<parameter=world_model>
{"game_tier": {"action_semantics": {"RIGHT": "Moves avatar +3 cols right, charcoal moves -3 (opposite)", "LEFT": "Moves avatar -3 cols left, charcoal moves +3 (opposite)", "DOWN": "Moves avatar +3 rows down; GAME_OVER only on left side", "UP": "Moves avatar -3 rows up, charcoal moves +3 (opposite)", "SPACE": "Moves avatar UP 3 rows only in specific conditions", "MOUSE": "No effect", "ACTION7": "No effect"}, "object_taxonomy": {"black_with_dots": "Player avatar", "charcoal_shape": "Moves OPPOSITE to avatar", "yellow_shape": "Target", "sky_blue_strip": "Vertical divider"}, "hud_map": {"right_col": "Yellow strip - timer"}, "win_pattern": {}, "level_log": {"level_1": "Charcoal crossed divider. Moving toward target."}, "cross_level_notes": ""}, "level_tier": {"world_model": "Charcoal at col 33, target at col 51. Avatar at col 21.", "goal_model": "Get charcoal to overlap target by moving LEFT 6 more times", "recent_findings": ["Charcoal crossed divider to right side"], "open_questions": ["Will charcoal reaching target complete level?"], "current_plan": "6 LEFT moves to push charcoal to target", "strategy_log": [], "failed_probes": ["ACTION7", "MOUSE", "DOWN at left side", "SPACE at target"]}}
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
